basic_info.name: CFD
basic_info.description: Segmentation packaging of CrackForest Dataset (CFD), with pixel-level road crack masks for top-down pavement imagery.

imaging_setup.lighting_conditions: Outdoor road scenes under visible-light illumination

annotation_schema.description: Binary crack masks paired with annotated CFD images

geographic_coverage.temporal_scope: Dataset v1.0 released in 2015 and used in 2016 publication

quality_assurance.annotation_quality: Pixel-level masks released in CrackForest dataset repository
